Dialog.name: MSG_Monad01_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20134 0 0}Is this... a door? Could you please get a little closer to it for me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Monad02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20131 0 0}Um, is something wrong? The door isn't that way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Monad04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20136 0 0}Uh, please wait! There are only stairs up ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I really think we should figure out what's going on, so please come back for now.[n]{f 1 1}
